mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sido_name FROM region_code WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND is_abolished = 'N' ORDER BY sido_name
SELECT DISTINCT sigungu_name, sigungu_code FROM region_code WHERE sido_name = #{sidoName} AND del_yn = 'N' AND is_abolished = 'N' ORDER BY sigungu_name
SELECT region_code, umd_name FROM region_code WHERE sigungu_code = #{sigunguCode} AND del_yn = 'N' AND is_abolished = 'N' ORDER BY umd_name
